calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Feb-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Ryan Kadevari Esq. 510-337-1001 of Weinmerg, Roger & Rosenfeld for Petitioner THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND.
No other Appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER THE BOARD OF TRUSTEES, CARPENTERS VACATION-HOLIDAY TRUST FUND, CARPENTERS ANNUITY TRUST FUND'S Hearing On Petition To Confirm Arbitration Award.

GRANTED. No opposition filed.

Order and Judgment are signed. (see scanned Order and Judgment for details)

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr., Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/RBU)
